    Called when the available times are updated.

    Called when available times are updated by the client.

    updateClosingHours() - Method in class Controllers.RestaurantSettingsController
    Updates the closing hours for the selected day.
    updateClosingHours(RestaurantSettings, Day) - Method in class DAO.RestaurantSettingsDAO
    Updates only the closing time for a specific day using the main settings object. * @param r the RestaurantSettings object.
    updateClosingHours(WeeklyOpeningHours) - Method in class DAO.RestaurantSettingsDAO
    Updates the closing hours based on a WeeklyOpeningHours object. * @param hours the object containing the day and new time.

    Command implementation for updating the standard closing time for a specific day of the week.

    Updates or clears the exit reason for a specific entry.

    Updates the exit reason for an entry that is currently active.

    Updates the global maximum number of tables allowed in the restaurant.

    Updates the maximum table capacity in the system and the database.

    userId - Variable in class Controllers.SubscriberController
     
    userId - Variable in class messages.CancelWaitingRequest
    The user ID associated with the entry, null if a guest.
    userId - Variable in class messages.ForgotCodeRequest
    The unique identifier (ID) of the user who requested the code recovery.
    userId - Variable in class messages.SeatCustomerRequest
    The unique identifier (ID) of the user/customer to be seated.
    userID - Variable in class Controllers.LoginController
    Text field for the user to enter their ID.
    userID - Variable in class Controllers.RegisterationController
    Text fields for user input during registration: - userID: the ID of the user - name: full name - phone: phone number - email: email address - userName: username for login - membershipCode: optional membership code (for subscribers)
    userID - Variable in class Entities.User
     
    userID - Variable in class Entities.WaitingListEntry
    The user ID, null if the entry belongs to a guest.
    userID - Variable in class messages.AddToWaitingListRequest
    The user ID, null if the request is from a guest.
    userID - Variable in class messages.GetUserInformationRequest
    The unique identifier (ID) of the user whose information is being requested.
    userID - Variable in class messages.LoginRequest
    The unique identifier (ID) of the user attempting to log in.
    userID - Variable in class messages.RegisterRequest
    The unique identifier for the user.
    username - Variable in class messages.RegisterRequest
    The login username chosen by the user.
    userName - Variable in class Controllers.InformationController
     
    userName - Variable in class Controllers.RegisterationController
    Text fields for user input during registration: - userID: the ID of the user - name: full name - phone: phone number - email: email address - userName: username for login - membershipCode: optional membership code (for subscribers)
    userName - Variable in class Entities.Manager
     
    userName - Variable in class Entities.Subscriber
     
    userName - Variable in class Entities.Supervisor
    Username used for login or identification.
